full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0877: owner directive and Prime Builder planning program for GT-KB/application isolation. The record captures the detailed inventory of current Agent Red and GT-KB interdependencies, classifies each dependency into parent GT-KB product artifacts, scoped GT-KB services, application-local governed state, or session overlays, identifies errors and inefficiencies in the service/overlay proposal, and seeds the top priority backlog with GTKB-ISOLATION-001 through GTKB-ISOLATION-007 so later sessions can create detailed phase implementation plans.
explicit_change_request: Owner requested a cautious, fine-grained implementation planning session for GT-KB/application isolation, beginning with detailed system inventory, capturing all planning in the Deliberation Archive, and adding all resulting phase-plan items to the top priority backlog.
change_reason: Archive the GT-KB/application isolation inventory and phased planning program.
